title: **🏹 {_bot_display_name} Loot Hunter**
description: Get {_bot_display_name} to watch da prizez and yell at ya when dere'z loot to take.
user_flows_1: Pick da game ya wanna rob
user_flows_2: Go in and pick what shiny stuff ya want to watch.
task_map_1: Stuff: I got a lizt of what it'z worth.
task_map_2: Alertz: I'll yell in yer ear when it'z cheap enough to buy.
admin_flows_1: Check da groundz to turn 'em on from da Boss View.

poe2.title: **💎 {_bot} Treasurez in Path of Exile 2**
poe2.description: Putre watchez da prizez so ya don't 'ave to, ya lazy git.
poe2.game_description:
Try yer luck wiv Putre'z bonez! 🎲 Roll free dice and take da gold if ya get a trio of onez!/n -Pairz: x1
 -Trioz: x3
 -High Straight: x5
poe2.lueague_description: Pick da PoE2 league for Putre to watch

dropdown.league_fate_of_the_vaal_description: Watch da league wiv red monsterz
dropdown.league_hardcore_description: Watch da league where ya die for real
dropdown.poe2_item_add_description: Tell me summat new to watch
dropdown.hunter_frequency_description: How fast Putre checkz da loot
